words.def: a rude expression intended to offend or hurt
words.zh: n. 侮辱, 無禮, 損害

words.def: any division of quantity accepted as a standard of measurement or exchange
words.zh: n. 單位, 分隊, 部隊, 單元, 部件, 裝置

words.def: a database containing an ordered array of items (names or topics)
words.zh: n. 目錄, 名單, 明細表, 布條, 條紋, 列表, 序列, 資料清單

words.def: the star that is the source of light and heat for the planets in the solar system
words.zh: n. 太陽, 日, 日光, 陽光
vi. 坐, 就座, 坐落

words.def: the branch of engineering that deals with the use of computers and telecommunications to retrieve and store and transmit information
